name: Classic Hummus
description: Smooth, creamy chickpea hummus made with tahini, lemon, and cumin. A timeless Jain-friendly classic.

name: Roasted Red Pepper Dip
description: Sweet, smoky roasted red peppers blended with cashews and a hint of chilli. Bold flavour, Jain-friendly.

name: Spinach & Herb Dip
description: Fresh spinach, coriander, and mint blended into a vibrant dip. Light, refreshing, and 100% Jain-friendly.

name: Falafel (6 pcs)
description: Crispy on the outside, tender inside. Made with chickpeas, herbs, and spices — no onion, no garlic.

name: Lavash (4 sheets)
description: Thin, crispy flatbread — the perfect companion for our dips. Freshly baked, Jain-friendly.

name: Dips Platter (3 dips + lavash)
description: A curated platter with three signature dips and lavash sheets. Perfect for entertaining.
